command_log.command: WHEEL_LIB_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.390/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh" && WORKFLOW_FILE="workflows/agent-chain.json" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "$WORKFLOW_FILE") && workflow_validate_unique_ids "$WORKFLOW" && state_init ".wheel/state.json" "$WORKFLOW" "$WORKFLOW_FILE" && echo "Workflow 'agent-chain' started ($(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq '.steps | length') steps)." && echo "First step: $(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].id') ($(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].type'))" && echo "" && echo "Hooks are now active. Run /wheel-status to check progress, /wheel-stop to deactivate."

echo "## Git Stats" && echo "Commits (last 30 days): $(git log --since='30 days ago' --oneline | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Contributors: $(git log --since='30 days ago' --format='%aN' | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Branches: $(git branch -a | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Latest tag: $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo 'none')"
